notes: Signpost IoT platform backplane BOM (lab11/signpost rev D). Four comment rows beginning with '#' plus one blank row precede the data header, placing the header at row index 5. Has 'Do Not Insert' (DNI) and 'Can Substitue?' (sic) qualifier columns. Multiple distributor columns: DIGIKEY, DIGIKEY2, MOUSER, NEWARK. Final non-data rows contain fiducials/solder jumper and a trailing note row. Real Samsung, Murata, Texas Instruments, Sullins, Abracon MPNs with Digi-Key part numbers.
